sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational event with no expected material impact on financial performance.

sentiment.reasoning: A 5% increase in customer acquisition is a positive growth indicator that likely translates into incremental revenue.

headlines.headline: Myrnon Therapeutics reports record quarterly revenue, up 18% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 18% is a strong fundamental indicator of business health and market demand.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
